Żurawina Kompot
Cranberry Compote

Ingredients:
- 4 cups fresh or frozen cranberries
- 3 cups water
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 cinnamon stick
- 4 whole cloves
- 2 bay leaves
- 1/4 teaspoon cardamom (optional)
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/4 cup honey (optional, for extra sweetness)

Instructions:
Combine water and sugar in large saucepan.
Bring to boil, stirring until sugar dissolves completely.
Add cinnamon stick, cloves, bay leaves, and cardamom.
Reduce heat and simmer 5 minutes.
Add cranberries and return to gentle simmer.
Cook 15-20 minutes until berries burst and soften.
Stir in lemon juice and honey if using.
Remove from heat and let cool.
Discard cinnamon stick and bay leaves before serving.

Storage:
Can be refrigerated up to 2 weeks.
Pour into sterilized jars for shelf storage up to 6 months.

Serving suggestions:
- Serve chilled as dessert
- Pour over vanilla ice cream
- Use as topping for cheesecake
- Mix into yogurt for breakfast
- Serve warm with bread as preserve

Prep time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 25 minutes
Yields: about 5 cups
